title: Profit First
author: Mike Michalowicz
subline: Reverse the formula. Take profit first — then pay the bills.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- The OLD formula: S - E = P — drawn in muted graphite. The NEW formula: S - P = E — drawn in white below. The single red element is a thick red strikethrough slashing the old equation. -->
  <text x="126" y="320" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">FORMULA 01 · THE OLD WAY</text>
  <g transform="translate(800 720)" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2">
    <path d="M -480 -100 L 480 -100 L 240 80 L 240 180 L -240 180 L -240 80 Z"/>
  </g>
  <text x="800" y="1180" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="220" font-weight="300" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="-0.04em">S − E = P</text>
  <line x1="220" y1="1140" x2="1380" y2="1220" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="6"/>
  <text x="1380" y="1240" text-anchor="end" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.18em">WRONG</text>
  <text x="800" y="1980" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="220" font-weight="300" fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="-0.04em">S − P = E</text>
  <rect x="380" y="1900" width="40" height="80" fill="#ffffff"/>
  <text x="126" y="2160" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc" letter-spacing="0.18em">FORMULA 02 · THE NEW WAY</text>
</svg>
rationale: The two formulas are the cover. The OLD 'S - E = P' is muted graphite, slashed by a single red diagonal strikethrough. The NEW 'S - P = E' sits below in white with a small filled bar marking 'profit first'. The 420px uppercase 'PROFIT FIRST' title is centered, weight 500, commanding — a finance book needs authority.
